case_title: AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS MILIKEN, TED H.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,576.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $78.08 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,552.26 ACCRUED INTEREST, $23.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $78.08 AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H.
APPLICATION AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED ONLY. NO ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT ON FILE.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,838.78 ACCRUED INTEREST, $23.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT MILIKEN, TED H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
